networkConfig.setStaticCommand: nmcli con mod ${interface} ipv4.addresses ${ipaddr}/8 ipv4.method "manual" ipv6.method "disabled"

pipelines:
[ "AprilTagPipelineSettings", {
  "pipelineIndex" : 0,
  "pipelineType" : "AprilTag",
  "inputImageRotationMode" : "DEG_0",
  "pipelineNickname" : "New Pipeline",

  },

  },

  "offsetSinglePoint" : {
    "x" : 0.0,

  },
  "offsetDualPointA" : {
    "x" : 0.0,
    "y" : 0.0
  },
  "offsetDualPointAArea" : 0.0,
  "offsetDualPointB" : {
    "x" : 0.0,
    "y" : 0.0
  },
  "offsetDualPointBArea" : 0.0,
  "contourGroupingMode" : "Single",
  "contourIntersection" : "Up",
  "solvePNPEnabled" : true,
  "targetModel" : "kAprilTag6p5in_36h11",
  "cornerDetectionStrategy" : "APPROX_POLY_DP_AND_EXTREME_CORNERS",
  "cornerDetectionUseConvexHulls" : true,
  "cornerDetectionExactSideCount" : false,
  "cornerDetectionSideCount" : 4,
  "cornerDetectionAccuracyPercentage" : 10.0,
  "tagFamily" : "kTag36h11",
  "decimate" : 1,
  "blur" : 0.0,
  "threads" : 4,
  "debug" : false,
  "refineEdges" : true,
  "numIterations" : 40,
  "hammingDist" : 0,
  "decisionMargin" : 35,
  "doMultiTarget" : true,
  "doSingleTargetAlways" : false
} ]
